methodology_other:
[Tracking Trade from Space: An Application to Pacific Island Countries](https://www.imf.org/en/publications/wp/issues/2021/08/20/tracking-trade-from-space-an-application-to-pacific-island-countries-464345)

[Nowcasting Global Trade from Space](https://www.imf.org/en/publications/wp/issues/2025/05/16/nowcasting-global-trade-from-space-566957)
name: daily-chokepoint-transit-calls-and-shipment-volume-estimates
notes: Daily transit calls and estimates of transit shipment volumes (in metric tons) for 28 chokepoints around the world.

organization.name: portwatch
organization.title: PortWatch
organization.description:
PortWatch offers cutting edge analytical tools to help users assess the domestic and international trade impact of actual and future disasters, such as extreme weather events. Building on extensive research, PortWatch uses satellite-based vessel data and big data analytics to produce actionable insights for policymakers, international organizations and the general public.

PortWatch is a joint initiative of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), the University of Oxford, and Delft University of Technology.

title: Daily Chokepoint Transit Calls and Shipment Volume Estimates

resources.description: Daily chokepoint transit calls and preliminary transit shipment volume estimates for 28 major chokepoints worldwide. See variable descriptions [here](https://portwatch.imf.org/datasets/42132aa4e2fc4d41bdaf9a445f688931/about)
